mapper.select: select id, subject_code, subject_name, description, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from subject where deleted = 0 order by id asc
select id, subject_code, subject_name, description, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from subject where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
select id, subject_code, subject_name, description, status, create_time, update_time, deleted from subject where subject_code = #{subjectCode} and deleted = 0 limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into subject(subject_code, subject_name, description, status, create_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{subjectCode}, #{subjectName}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{deleted})
mapper.update: update subject set subject_code = #{subjectCode}, subject_name = #{subjectName}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, update_time = #{updateTime} where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
update subject set deleted = 1, update_time = now() where id = #{id} and deleted = 0
